info.description: API documentation for Kasvior Wallet backend application
info.title: Backend Kasvior Wallet API

post.description: Authenticate a user and return an access token.
Send password reset instructions when the email is registered.

200.description: Reset password instructions have been sent

post.description: Create a new user account with email and password.
Reset a user password using a valid password reset token.

get.description: Get authenticated user transaction history. Pending transactions are excluded.

parameters.description: Search by counterparty, phone, type, payment method, or notes
parameters.name: q

get.description: Get available payment methods for topup.

post.description: Create a topup transaction for the authenticated user.
Create a pending transfer transaction for the authenticated user.

get.description: Get receiver suggestions for the authenticated user.

parameters.description: Receiver name or phone number search keyword
parameters.name: search

get.description: Get profile information for the authenticated user.

patch.description: Update at least one profile field for the authenticated user. Profile fields are limited to 255 characters.

get.description: Get balance information for the authenticated user.
Get expense information for the authenticated user.
Get income information for the authenticated user.

patch.description: Update the authenticated user's 6-digit numeric PIN.

post.description: Validate the authenticated user's 6-digit numeric PIN. When transaction_id is provided, finalize the pending transfer.

401.description: Invalid PIN, PIN not set, or unauthorized

get.description: Get the authenticated user's transaction report for the last 7 days.

ApiKeyAuth.description: Bearer token used for authorization. Example: Bearer <token>
ApiKeyAuth.name: Authorization
